name: @anvil-dev/dashboard
description: React dashboard and Node.js server for Anvil — real-time pipeline orchestration, knowledge graph visualization, and agent management

scripts.build: vite build && tsc -p server/tsconfig.json && cp server/out/*.js server/out/*.d.ts server/ 2>/dev/null; cp server/out/adapters/*.js server/out/adapters/*.d.ts server/adapters/ 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p server/plan-validator-rules && cp server/out/plan-validator-rules/*.js server/out/plan-validator-rules/*.d.ts server/plan-validator-rules/ 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p server/review-rules && cp server/out/review-rules/*.js server/out/review-rules/*.d.ts server/review-rules/ 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p server/review-checks && cp server/out/review-checks/*.js server/out/review-checks/*.d.ts server/review-checks/ 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p server/review-verifier-test-generators && cp server/out/review-verifier-test-generators/*.js server/out/review-verifier-test-generators/*.d.ts server/review-verifier-test-generators/ 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p server/incident-parsers && cp server/out/incident-parsers/*.js server/out/incident-parsers/*.d.ts server/incident-parsers/ 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p server/steps && cp server/out/steps/*.js server/out/steps/*.d.ts server/steps/ 2>/dev/null; true
